name: Competitor Pricing Change Watch
description: Every Monday it checks your competitors' pricing and flags anything that moved since last time. So you find out they changed their prices from your own research, not from a customer.
prompt_template: Check the current pricing of the competitors I track and compare it to what you found before. Flag any changes, new plans, dropped offers, or shifts in what they include. For each change, add a short note on what it might mean for me and how I should respond. If nothing moved, just say so. Give it to me as a short draft to review.
